settings.hero_subtext: Discover our curated collection of luxury goods, crafted for the modern connoisseur.

settings.title: Featured Collection
settings.subtitle: Handpicked pieces for the discerning eye

settings.heading: Our Story
settings.text: Every piece in our collection tells a story of craftsmanship and dedication. We source the finest materials from around the world to create products that stand the test of time.

settings.question: What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer: We offer worldwide shipping. Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be in original condition.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination.

settings.heading: Stay in Touch
settings.subtext: Subscribe to receive updates, access to exclusive deals, and more.
